experiences.title: Web Engineer
description: Enable marketing teams to launch campaigns independently by building tested, accessible, and SEO-friendly components featuring Monzo content, integrated with our CMS.
Led the end-to-end development of a new video component to enhance website visuals and support marketing initiatives, collaborating closely with stakeholders to align on requirements and objectives.
Focus on engineering for internationalisation to support Monzo's expansion into new countries.
Provide technical support for high-impact marketing initiatives.

experiences.title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Developed internal web applications and backend services that enabled marketing teams to create and launch global promotional campaigns efficiently.
Designed and implemented dashboards and visualization tools using Figma, ReactJS, TypeScript, Visx, and GraphQL to provide actionable campaign insights.
Implemented backend features in Java to improve system performance, reliability, and functionality.
Ensured high-quality production code through comprehensive testing with Jest, React Testing Library, and JUnit.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Designed and implemented an internal web application featuring a metrics dashboard, allowing teams to monitor how their features impact the Spotify mobile application bundle size.
Built reusable ReactJS components with TypeScript, focusing on readability, maintainability, and responsiveness.
Ensured component robustness and quality through comprehensive testing with Jest and React Testing Library.

experiences.title: Data Scientist Intern
description: Created tools and features to help insurance companies improve their fraud detection and claims automation processes.
Developed a production-ready Python module for automated document analysis using machine learning and computer vision techniques.
Created Python scripts to extract key insights from data to support decision-making.
Integrated client feedback into product updates and implemented backend features in C#.

experiences.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Built a full-stack web application for the management of vehicle fleets, contributing to extending Titan Aviation's product range and increasing its competitive advantage.
Designed and implemented the database schema with MySQL and the backend REST API with Django and Django Rest Framework.
Created dashboards and visualization tools for fleet management with a responsive interface using CSS3 and Bootstrap.
Implemented backend features with Python and Django to improve performance and integration, and hosted the application on Azure.
Led a team of four engineers by organizing daily stand-ups and delegating tasks.
